<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelPackageTools\Concerns\PackageServiceProvider; trait ProcessAssets { protected function bootPackageAssets(): static { if (! $this->package->hasAssets || ! $this->app->runningInConsole()) { return $this; } $vendorAssets = $this->package->basePath('/../resources/dist'); $appAssets = public_path("vendor/{$this->package->shortName()}"); $this->publishes([$vendorAssets => $appAssets], "{$this->package->shortName()}-assets"); return $this; } }
